utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with hotel selection and costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (Prague, Czech Republic) — fully specified; travel_dates (June 20–24, 2024) — fully specified; transportation — flight details are given but cost is only 'Included in package' (acceptable since cost is mentioned though not numeric, still covered); accommodation — hotel name and 'Included in package' cost (covered); activities — one activity with cost (covered); additional_services — explicitly null (means not included, so not covered); total_budget — total cost and currency (covered). Therefore, 6 of 7 required items are included and sufficiently specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes: destination 'Prague, Czech Republic' (found in destinations list, rating 6); transportation 'Flights with Standard Airline, economy class' (corresponds to 'standard_airlines' → 'Economy Class', rating 5); accommodation 'Family Haven Hotel' (found in accommodation list, rating 8); activity 'City Walking Tour' (found in activities list, rating 8).
